---
title: "Series"
description: "Longer arguments built across several posts."
pagetitle: "Series — Yee Seng Chan"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    body-classes: series-index
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/series/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "order asc"
  template: series-listing.ejs
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, description, parts]
  image-placeholder: series-placeholder.svg
---
